headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: West Pharmaceutical (WST) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +27.00% and +8.55%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
